title: P&D Supreme 9-Inch Paint Roller Tray Set (2-Pack), Built for 9-in Roller Brushes
features: TWO-PACK DELUXE QUALITY: Our 9-inch paint roller tray offers you the best quality there is. Cheap, plastic and uneven paint trays are yesterday’s news. Get the best roller tray for your project there is and get the job done right.
DEEP PAINT POCKET: Hours and hours of rolling and painting will be made simply and efficiently with a deep paint pocket. Pour the right amount of paint to get the job done faster.

TEXTURED RIDGE & STURDY LEGS: Designed with a textured ridge as a roll off area for even loading. Make sure your paint job is even and uniform for that smooth and velvety finish we all love. Our 9-inch roller tray is built with sturdy legs to ensure smooth rolling, allowing no room for streaking and unintentional textured pattern.
GREAT FOR MANY USES: Excellent for home touch-ups and home renovations, getting the nooks and crannies, nursery room, and even a game room!
description: We know you’re tired of bubbles forming during painting. We bet you’re also done with the streaking and ugly patterns left by low quality trays. And what about the horror of spending hours and hours on a single wall that was supposed to be a smooth paint job? Our Precision Defined 9-Inch Paint Roller Tray got you covered! Our painter roller tray 2-pack can be used on home touch-ups and home renovations, painting bathrooms, outdoor decks, nursery room, and even a game room. It’s a very versatile tool to help you paint better and faster. We can assure you there will be no more bubbles, no more cracking, no more streaking and no more uneven paint! Our 4inch roller tray is made of quality material that smooth application of paint. This set includes: 2 x 9-inch paint roller tray
